name: Sweet & Sour Garlic Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare, trim and slice the vegetables.
2. In a large jar, combine vinegar, sugar, and salt. Mix well.
3. Add the vegetables to the jar and shake to coat evenly.
4. Cover the jar and refrigerate overnight, shaking occasionally.
5. In another small jar, mix vegetable oil and garlic.
6. When ready to serve, drain the vegetables and place on a serving platter.
7. Pour the garlic oil over the vegetables and serve with toothpicks.
8. Makes about 4 cups.
